ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, lab manager, principal investigator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the image belongs to */,
  "fov" INTEGER /* Field of view of the image */,
  "line" INTEGER /* Line number of the image */,
  "cellID" INTEGER /* Cell ID in the image */,
  "parentID" INTEGER /* Parent ID of the cell */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Frame number of the image */,
  "tTrans" REAL /* Time of transmission */,
  "image_quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the image (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path or URL of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the measurement belongs to */,
  "w" REAL /* Width of the cell */,
  "L" REAL /* Length of the cell */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the cell */,
  "V" REAL /* Volume of the cell */,
  "SA" REAL /* Surface area of the cell */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell (e.g., epithelial, fibroblast) */,
  "cell_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the cell (e.g., healthy, diseased) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measurement (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_measurements_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the growth rate belongs to */,
  "growthRateL2_0" REAL /* Growth rate of length */,
  "growthRatearea2_0" REAL /* Growth rate of area */,
  "growthRateV2_0" REAL /* Growth rate of volume */,
  "growthRateSA2_0" REAL /* Growth rate of surface area */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval over which the growth rate was calculated (e.g., 1 hour, 24 hours) */,
  "growth_model" TEXT /* Model used to calculate the growth rate (e.g., linear, exponential) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_rates_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES cell_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made (e.g., lab, home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
